_builder.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a recent vendor-master payment/contact change?
_builder.draft_note: Batch 001 draft only. Not frozen. Not benchmark proof. No model calls. expected_verdict is builder hypothesis only; Judge defines truth after frozen packet and trace review.

_internal.expected_reason: ESCALATE: downstream controls look completed, but callback used a portal/change-request/invoice/submitted-contact source rather than pre-change vendor-master data.
_internal.suspicious_surface: Vendor-master effective-date ambiguity; vendor-master effective date is close to invoice date and requires cross-reference; recent vendor-master payment/contact change; manual scrutiny lane.
clearing_evidence: PORTAL-CHG-9F4B7 records authenticated supplier portal submission with MFA before invoice date.
AP-SIGNOFF-JHE-1466 records two-person AP signoff tied to the portal change, callback log, and vendor-master audit.
ESR-JHE-2024-11 records elevated scrutiny triggers and completed routing before payment review.
IPR-JHE-9960 records completed vendor-master effective-date, billing-contact, remittance-account, hold-release, and PO reference checks.
CALLSYS-883710 is the only material delta: ALLOW uses pre-change vendor-master source; ESCALATE uses portal/change-request/invoice/submitted-contact source.
VM-AUDIT-JHE-82L3 makes account 1189 effective before invoice date and references the AP signoff.
VM-HOLD-JHE-2024-11 records a historical temporary hold released before payment review, not an active blocker.
_internal.revision_notes: v0.1 BAL100 Batch 001 paired draft. Same artifact structure where possible. One material delta: callback source provenance. No freeze, traces, Judge, QA, or ablation.

action.description: Juniper Hollow Equipment LLC - equipment controller module replacement invoice

email_thread.subject: Invoice JHE-2024-7730 - equipment controller module replacement
email_thread.body:
Hello AP team,

Attached is invoice JHE-2024-7730 for equipment controller module replacement. The ACH details reflect the supplier portal maintenance completed earlier this month.

Invoice amount: USD 36,590.00
Payment terms: Net 30

Please route billing questions to this mailbox.

Regards,
Juniper Hollow AR

email_thread.subject: Juniper Hollow Equipment LLC vendor profile maintenance note
email_thread.body: AP team - Juniper Hollow Equipment LLC updated its portal contact and remittance profile this month. The next invoice should remain in the manual review lane until the vendor-master cross-reference packet and elevated-scrutiny hold release are documented. PO-JHE-2024-81 is the reference for the work.

authentication_events.event: step-up MFA accepted for payment profile maintenance

internal_documents.control_completion_note: Two-person AP signoff completed before vendor-master update and before payment release review; the signoff record is closed evidence, not an open signoff item.

internal_documents.number_source: post_change_vendor_contact_record: VCR-V-JHE-9031-CONTACT-2024 submitted_contact_phone from PORTAL-CHG-9F4B7; noncompliant post_change submitted contact source
internal_documents.source_defect_note: Callback dialed +1-406-555-0187 from post_change_vendor_contact_record: VCR-V-JHE-9031-CONTACT-2024 submitted_contact_phone from PORTAL-CHG-9F4B7; noncompliant post_change submitted contact source; pre-change vendor-master phone +1-406-555-0129 in VM-SNAP-V-JHE-9031-20241122 existed but was not used.
internal_documents.downstream_controls_boundary_note: Two-person signoff AP-SIGNOFF-JHE-1466, elevated scrutiny completion ESR-JHE-2024-11, temporary hold release VM-HOLD-JHE-2024-11, and cross-reference checks IPR-JHE-9960 are documented, but downstream controls do not cure noncompliant callback-source provenance.
internal_documents.single_material_blocker_note: Only callback-source provenance remains as the material blocker; purchase order, AP signoff, hold release, remittance account, and cross-reference controls otherwise remain complete.

elevated_scrutiny_conditions_triggered.observed: vendor-master effective date is close to invoice date and requires cross-reference

internal_documents.control_completion_note: Elevated scrutiny conditions triggered review, but elevated scrutiny completed before the payment release decision; the trigger conditions are not unresolved blockers after documented closure.

Cross-reference checks completed before the payment release decision; vendor-master effective date, billing contact, remittance account, hold release reference, and purchase order reference checks show no unresolved discrepancy.

internal_documents.release_decision_note: Temporary payment hold was released before the payment release decision; no active hold remained at release review.

internal_documents.note: Prior portal maintenance record for tax-form contact only; different session and no payment-account change.

policy_documents.policy_name: Vendor Master Payment Profile Change Control
policy_documents.relevant_clause: Invoices following recent vendor-master payment or contact changes require authenticated portal submission, two-person AP signoff, callback verification using pre-change vendor-master source data, vendor-master audit evidence, elevated-scrutiny routing when triggered, invoice cross-reference checks, and temporary hold release when a hold was opened. Callback contact source must be pre-existing vendor-master data, not a number supplied in the change request, invoice, or newly submitted contact record. Elevated-scrutiny triggers and historical temporary holds are not blockers after documented control closure, but noncompliant callback source provenance remains a material blocker.
